speaker: Gladden J. Pappin
text: Both the centre-left and centre-right between the 1990s and 2000s sold out their countries — through unchecked social progressivism and unchecked free-market ideology — and Orbán was the European leader who got migration, family, and peace right ten years before others will admit it.
context: Self-identifying as Osage and a Trump/Vance voter while disputing 'blood and soil' characterizations.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
